description: Turn-based hex strategy — expand territory, fight AI opponent, strength mechanics
prompt: Build a turn-based hex grid strategy game with HTML5 canvas. 7x7 hex map, player vs AI. Each hex has strength 1-6. Click your hex then click adjacent hex to attack or expand. If attacker strength > defender, capture the hex. Hexes regenerate +1 strength per turn. AI uses greedy strategy. Win by controlling 60% of hexes. Purple for player, orange for AI. Dark theme with neon accents.

tasks.subject: Create hex grid coordinate system and rendering
